access_token.description: Shutterstock OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token.

query.description: Optional search query filter passed through to search-style streams.

sort.description: Optional sort order filter passed through to search-style streams.

orientation.description: Optional orientation filter passed through to media search streams.

category.description: Optional category filter passed through to media search streams.

image_ids.description: Comma-separated Shutterstock image IDs for image detail, recommendations, similar, and image-list fan-out streams.

video_ids.description: Comma-separated Shutterstock video IDs for video detail, similar, and video-list fan-out streams.

audio_ids.description: Comma-separated Shutterstock audio track IDs for audio detail and audio-list fan-out streams.

sfx_ids.description: Comma-separated Shutterstock sound-effect IDs for SFX detail and SFX-list fan-out streams.

editorial_image_ids.description: Comma-separated editorial image IDs for editorial image fan-out streams.

editorial_ids.description: Comma-separated editorial asset IDs for generic editorial detail fan-out streams.

editorial_video_ids.description: Comma-separated editorial video IDs for editorial video fan-out streams.

image_collection_ids.description: Comma-separated image collection IDs for collection detail and items fan-out streams.

video_collection_ids.description: Comma-separated video collection IDs for collection detail and items fan-out streams.

audio_collection_ids.description: Comma-separated audio collection IDs for collection detail and items fan-out streams.

editorial_image_livefeed_ids.description: Comma-separated editorial image livefeed IDs for livefeed fan-out streams.

editorial_livefeed_ids.description: Comma-separated editorial livefeed IDs for livefeed fan-out streams.

visual_asset_ids.description: Comma-separated asset IDs for computer-vision similar-media streams.

contributor_ids.description: Comma-separated contributor IDs for contributor fan-out streams.

contributor_id.description: Contributor ID used with contributor_collection_ids for nested contributor collection detail streams.

contributor_collection_ids.description: Comma-separated contributor collection IDs used with contributor_id for nested contributor collection detail streams.
